arts.ttl: Danilo Bids Farewell to Juventus with Pointed Remarks
arts.sum: A day after his official departure from Juventus, Brazilian defender Danilo left Turin's Caselle airport for Brazil shortly after 10 AM. The player, who had bid farewell to the Bianconeri world with a much-discussed Instagram post yesterday, is set to join Flamengo. Before his departure, Danilo shared some final thoughts on his Juventus experience. The post Danilo Bids Farewell to Juventus with Pointed Remarks appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus and Vlahovic: A House Divided
arts.sum: The relationship between Juventus and Dusan Vlahovic has taken a dramatic turn, leaving both parties in a precarious situation. Once considered a cornerstone of the club's future, the Serbian striker now finds himself on the fringes of Thiago Motta's project, a development that could prove costly for both player and club. The post Juventus and Vlahovic: A House Divided appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus Manager Thiago Motta Speaks Ahead of Crucial Benfica Clash
arts.sum: Juventus head coach Thiago Motta addressed the media in a press conference on the eve of their crucial UEFA Champions League match against Benfica. The game, scheduled for tomorrow at the Allianz Stadium, marks the final matchday of the League Phase. While Juventus has already secured a spot in the playoffs, they still have a slim chance of direct qualification for the Round of 16. The post Juventus Manager Thiago Motta Speaks Ahead of Crucial Benfica Clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Juventus v Benfica: Match Preview
arts.sum: In a critical UEFA Champions League finale, Juventus and Benfica clash at the Allianz Stadium on Wednesday, with both teams fighting for crucial playoff positions. Juventus enter the match with 12 points, already assured of a playoff berth but desperately seeking automatic qualification to the Round of 16. To achieve this, they must win and hope that at least ten teams between fifth and sixteenth place fail to secure maximum points. The post Champions League | Juventus v Benfica: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.
